title: Sweat-stop

|type=[[Anti-sweat film]]<ref name="Anti-sweat film">While sweat-stop was only mentioned in ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'', [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] identified [[anti-sweat film]] as a term for sprayable substances used to prevent perspiration during surgery.</ref>

'''Sweat-stop''' was an [[anti-sweat film]], a type of substance capable of preventing perspiration.<ref name="Anti-sweat film" /> Usable by members of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the substance was applied by spraying it on an individual's skin.<ref name="MedStar I" />

In [[Medcenter/Legends|medical facilities]] located on many civilized [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], Human [[Doctor/Legends|surgeons]] sprayed sweat-stop on their faces before washing to prevent sweat from dripping into their [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] during surgical operations.<ref name="MedStar I" /> In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="TERC" /> the substance was one of many items in short supply for the medical staff at [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Republic Mobile Surgical Unit]] [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 7|7]] on the [[Temperature/Legends|hot]], humid planet [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]], where a long-lasting [[Battle of Drongar|battle]] was fought between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the sweat-stop shortage, the Human Republic surgeon [[Jos Vondar]] thought about the substance during a surgery to remove shrapnel from a [[Unidentified clone trooper (Drongar)|clone trooper]] while the [[air cooler]] installed in his area was malfunctioning.<ref name="MedStar I" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sweat-stop was briefly mentioned in ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'', a [[2004]] [[Clone Wars multimedia project|''Clone Wars'']] novel written by [[Steve Perry]] and [[Michael Reaves]] as the first part of the ''[[MedStar Duology]]''.<ref name="MedStar I" />

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1stm}}
